PROVIDES AFFORDABLE, SINGLE-ROOM OCCUPANCY HOUSING WITH SUPPORT. RESIDENTS HAVE EXPERIENCED SUBSTANCE ABUSE, HOMELESSNESS, MENTAL HEALTH AND POVERTY.

PROVIDES TRANSITIONAL HOUSING AND SUPPORTIVE SERVICES TO FAMILIES IN NEED, HELPING THEM ACHIEVE STABILITY, SELF-SUFFICIENCY, AND BRIGHTER FUTURES.

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: ADVOCATING FOR, AND MEETING THE NEEDS OF, THE REGIONS ECONOMICALLY AND OTHERWISE DISADVANTAGED CITIZENS.
PROVIDES ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT TO PEOPLE WITH INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES ACROSS THE ENTIRE REGION.
PROVIDES MEDICAL, DENTAL & BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES. THEY MAINTAIN A FACILITY IN EACH OF THE THREE PRIMARY MARKETS.
NON-PROFIT COMMUNITY MENTAL HEATH CENTER
A PUBLIC/PRIVATE HIGH SCHOO INCORPORATED IN 1854, NFA IS THE ONLY REMAINING PRIVATELY GOVERNED, INDEPENDENTLY ENDOWED ACADEMIES IN CONNECTICUT.

OTIS LIBRARY IS A TRUSTED INFORMATIONAL AND CULTURAL HUB THAT PROVIDES FREE RESOURCES FOR PERSONAL GROWTH AND LIFELONG LEARNING. IINSPIRING LASTING CONNECTIONS AND FOSTERING COMMUNITY IN A SAFE, WELCOMING ENVIRONMENT.

LiquidationExplanationStmt.ExplanationTxt: AS OF 12/31/25 EASTERN CT SAVINGS BANK FOUNDATION, INC. WAS DISSOLVED, AND ALL ITS REMAINING CASH DISTRIBUTED TO CHARITABLE RECIPIENTS AS REPORTED ON PART XIV OF THE FORM 990-PF.
